payload.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Forecast remaining Builder delivery work" in phase "Forecast and Planning Operations"?
groundedNodeLabels: Model Victor as a separate governed project inside Builder and define the forecasting signals for remaining autonomy work.
Turn the new Victor and Builder planning artifacts into Builder-managed operational work so unattended execution has a governed next queue.
Queue next governed slices across Victor and Builder
Teach heartbeat to select the next governed slice after phase closure
Builder has an explicit next-step forecast instead of relying on narrative summaries.
recommendedNextActions: Implement builder has an explicit next-step forecast instead of relying on narrative summaries
